articles.title: Russell details how ‘car was transformed for the worse’
articles.summary: Russell details how ‘car was transformed for the worse’. George Russell has shared an insight into the issues behind his “really difficult” Qualifying at the Japanese Grand Prix, with the Briton admitting that a small adjustment appeared to have “transformed” his car “for the worse”.

articles.title: Antonelli soaks up ‘incredible feeling’ after taking Japan pole
articles.summary: Antonelli soaks up ‘incredible feeling’ after taking Japan pole. Kimi Antonelli came out on top in the battle for pole position at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Watch the highlights as Antonelli storms to Suzuka pole
articles.summary: Watch the highlights as Antonelli storms to Suzuka pole. Kimi Antonelli claimed his second consecutive pole position for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen reacts to 'difficult' Q2 exit in Japan
articles.summary: Verstappen reacts to 'difficult' Q2 exit in Japan. Max Verstappen admits that trying to tame his Red Bull car in Qualifying for the Japanese Grand Prix "was again very difficult", having been eliminated in Q2.

articles.title: Antonelli clinches pole ahead of Russell in Japan
articles.summary: Antonelli clinches pole ahead of Russell in Japan. Kimi Antonelli has stormed to pole position at the Japanese Grand Prix, the Italian following up on his maiden pole last time out in China to put himself at the front of the grid ahead of Mercedes team mate George Russell.

articles.title: AS IT HAPPENED: Antonelli beats Russell to Japanese GP pole
articles.summary: AS IT HAPPENED: Antonelli beats Russell to Japanese GP pole. Live coverage of Saturday's Qualifying session for the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix at Suzuka.

articles.title: Watch the FP3 highlights in Japan as Antonelli goes fastest
articles.summary: Watch the FP3 highlights in Japan as Antonelli goes fastest. Mercedes returned to the top of the times in Japan with Kimi Antonelli fastest during the final practice session at Suzuka Circuit.

articles.title: Antonelli beats team mate Russell in final Japan practice
articles.summary: Antonelli beats team mate Russell in final Japan practice. Kimi Antonelli finished fastest in Free Practice 3 ahead of the Japanese Grand Prix, beating team mate George Russell as Mercedes continued their strong start to 2026.

articles.title: AS IT HAPPENED: Follow the action from FP3 in Japan
articles.summary: AS IT HAPPENED: Follow the action from FP3 in Japan. Live coverage of Saturday's third practice session for the 2026 Japanese Grand Prix at Suzuka.

articles.title: A guide to in-race betting opportunities in Japan
articles.summary: A guide to in-race betting opportunities in Japan. When the lights go out at Suzuka, the real betting opportunities begin.

articles.title: Mercedes back on top in final practice at Suzuka
articles.summary: Mercedes back on top in final practice at Suzuka. Kimi Antonelli returned Mercedes to the top of the time sheet for final practice at the Japanese Grand Prix, with teammate George Russell making it a Mercedes 1-2.

articles.title: Suzuka FP1 outing ‘pretty incredible’ for Crawford despite limited running
articles.summary: Suzuka FP1 outing ‘pretty incredible’ for Crawford despite limited running. Aston Martin reserve driver Jak Crawford described the Suzuka circuit is “pretty incredible to drive" despite being limited to three flying laps during his FP1 outing for the team at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Honda says Aston Martin’s chassis, not just its power unit, is a factor in vibration problems
articles.summary: Honda says Aston Martin’s chassis, not just its power unit, is a factor in vibration problems. Honda Racing Corporation President Koji Watanabe says the vibration issues being suffered by Aston Martin are not solely down to the power unit itself, but also its integration with the chassis.

articles.title: McLaren downplays Friday pace at Suzuka
articles.summary: McLaren downplays Friday pace at Suzuka. McLaren says its Friday pace is likely to be an outlier despite Oscar Piastri setting the fastest time during the second practice session for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Piastri puts McLaren on top in second Japanese GP practice session
articles.summary: Piastri puts McLaren on top in second Japanese GP practice session. After shadowing the two Mercedes earlier in the day, McLaren's Oscar Piastri topped the field in Friday's second practice session for the Japanese GP at Suzuka.

articles.title: Russell continues Mercedes dominance in opening Japanese GP practice
articles.summary: Russell continues Mercedes dominance in opening Japanese GP practice. George Russell beat Mercedes teammate Kimi Antonelli to top spot in the first practice session for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Technical updates: 2026 Japanese Grand Prix
articles.summary: Technical updates: 2026 Japanese Grand Prix. Red Bull's upgrade package leads the list of technical developments as it looks to address its early handling difficulties at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen demands journalist's removal from media session
articles.summary: Verstappen demands journalist's removal from media session. Max Verstappen refused to start his media session at the Japanese Grand Prix on Thursday until a journalist from UK outlet The Guardian left the room due to his ongoing objection to a question the journalist asked at last year’s F1 title-de...

articles.title: Guarded optimism from drivers after FIA changes energy to bolster qualifying at Suzuka
articles.summary: Guarded optimism from drivers after FIA changes energy to bolster qualifying at Suzuka. The FIA has approved a change of conditions related to energy recharge limits in order to try and improve the qualifying challenge at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Norris still confident the McLaren can become the best F1 car of 2026
articles.summary: Norris still confident the McLaren can become the best F1 car of 2026. Lando Norris says McLaren is pushing hard to catch Mercedes and feels its 2026 car has “a lot of potential” ahead of this weekend’s Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli beats Russell to Japanese Grand Prix pole
articles.summary: Antonelli beats Russell to Japanese Grand Prix pole. Kimi Antonelli takes his second pole position in a row as he beats Mercedes team-mate George Russell in qualifying at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: How to follow Japanese Grand Prix on the BBC
articles.summary: How to follow Japanese Grand Prix on the BBC. All the key BBC coverage details for the Japanese Grand Prix, which takes place from 27-29 March.

articles.title: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions
articles.summary: Andrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questions. Our F1 correspondent Andrew Benson is doing a weekly Q&A this season, so get your questions in now.

articles.title: Russell surprised by McLaren pace in Japan practice
articles.summary: Russell surprised by McLaren pace in Japan practice. McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the pace in second practice at the Japanese Grand Prix ahead of the Mercedes of Kimi Antonelli and George Russell.

articles.title: F1: Chequered Flag
articles.summary: F1: Chequered Flag. Can anyone stop Mercedes as we head to the Suzuka Circuit for the Japanese Grand Prix?

articles.title: 'Get out' - Verstappen expels journalist from news conference
articles.summary: 'Get out' - Verstappen expels journalist from news conference. Max Verstappen ejects a journalist from his news conference at the Japanese Grand Prix over a row that dates back to Abu Dhabi last year.

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird
articles.summary: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancellations helpful for F1 teams - Bird. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird discuss the cancellation of the Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix cancellations and how the teams can turn the unexpected five-week gap into ...

articles.title: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley
articles.summary: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley. The Chequered Podcast's Harry Benjamin, Jennie Gow and Marc Priestly discuss Lewis Hamilton's strong performance in the Australian Grand Prix, plus his 'upbeat, positive' mood over race weekend.
